title: Legacy System Rescue
description: Forensic reverse-engineering of "black box" systems. Making undocumented legacy systems work when documentation doesn't exist.

title: Cross-Platform Integration
description: Building bridges between systems that weren't designed to talk. SCORM, xAPI, AICC protocol expertise.

title: AI Implementation
description: Thoughtful AI/LLM application. Understanding when to use generative AI vs. structured data for production systems.

title: Systems Architecture
description: Building foundational systems that harmonize—like the diapason register that gives a pipe organ its character.
